children.name: Hey Sarah! How is the new design system coming along?
children.characters: Hey Sarah! How is the new design system coming along?

children.name: It is going really well! We just finished the component library and are starting on the documentation.
children.characters: It is going really well! We just finished the component library and are starting on the documentation.

children.name: That is awesome! Can you share a preview?
children.characters: That is awesome! Can you share a preview?

children.name: Sure! I will send you the Figma link. We have about 40 components so far.
children.characters: Sure! I will send you the Figma link. We have about 40 components so far.

children.name: The tokens are all set up too - colors, spacing, typography. Everything is connected.
children.characters: The tokens are all set up too - colors, spacing, typography. Everything is connected.

children.name: Perfect. That sounds great! Let me know when the docs are ready for review.
children.characters: Perfect. That sounds great! Let me know when the docs are ready for review.

children.name: Will do! Should be ready by end of week.
children.characters: Will do! Should be ready by end of week.

children.name: That sounds great! Let me check my calendar and I will set up a review session.
children.characters: That sounds great! Let me check my calendar and I will set up a review session.
